name: Priya Nair
title: UI/UX Designer & Frontend Developer
summary: Award-winning UI/UX designer with 5+ years creating beautiful user-centered digital experiences. Specialized in building scalable design systems and collaborating with engineering teams to create delightful products.

experience.description: Leading design initiatives for payment processing platform used by enterprise customers.
achievements: Redesigned merchant dashboard increasing task completion rate by 28%
Led design system initiative with 50+ reusable components and documentation
Conducted 40+ user interviews and usability tests to validate designs
Collaborated with engineers to implement responsive design for 2M+ users

experience.description: Designed user experiences for restaurant partner platform.
achievements: Redesigned restaurant onboarding flow improving completion by 35%
Conducted 50+ user interviews and created detailed personas
Designed mobile-first interfaces for 500K+ restaurant partners
Created comprehensive design documentation reducing handoff time by 40%

experience.description: Designed interfaces for SaaS products and digital platforms.
achievements: Designed 10+ SaaS product interfaces resulting in $2M+ client revenue
Built responsive design system used across 15+ projects
Mentored 4 junior designers on design best practices

projects.title: FinDash Design System
projects.tagline: Complete design system for fintech products
projects.description: 80+ components, dark/light modes, accessibility compliant (WCAG 2.1 AA). Used internally by 5 product teams for consistent design language and faster development.

projects.title: Mindful
projects.description: End-to-end UI/UX design for meditation and mood tracking application. Includes complete onboarding flow, dashboard, session flows, and progress tracking components with soothing visual language.

projects.title: Fresh Start - Job Board Design
projects.description: Beautiful job board platform design with advanced filtering, job listings, applicant management, and analytics dashboard. Published in Figma community with 3K+ downloads.
